ddls:
CREATE TABLE "image_tags" (
  "image_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image tag */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_tag_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each image tag
ID of the image associated with the tag
